sections.paragraph:
Original: מקר מקור

Transliteration: mâqôr mâqôr

Phonetic: maw-kore'

BDB Definition:

  1. spring, fountain
    1. spring
      1. of source of life, joy, purification (figuratively)
    2. of the eye (figuratively)
    3. source (of menstruous blood)
    4. flow (of blood after child birth)

Origin: from H6979

TWOT entry: 2004a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
